content:
# Managed Service for Microsoft Active Directory documentation

[Read product documentation](https://cloud.google.com/managed-microsoft-ad/docs/overview)

## Documentation resources

Find quickstarts and guides, review key references, and get help with common issues.

## Related videos

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/eP2NacfdJzo/hqdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eP2NacfdJzo)

YouTube

[### Centralizing authentication for Cloud SQL for SQL Server](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eP2NacfdJzo)

Get started integrating Managed Microsoft AD with Cloud SQL for SQL Server → https://goo.gle/38G9Yns Cloud SQL is a fully-managed database service that makes it easy to set up and administer your relational MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server databases

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/WnKH49Tp9oI/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnKH49Tp9oI)

YouTube

[### Deep-dive Google Cloud’s Managed Microsoft AD and applications](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnKH49Tp9oI)

Running your Linux and Windows workloads and apps in the cloud depends on Microsoft Active Directory. Learn how the Google Cloud Managed Service for Microsoft Active Directory can deliver AD as a secure, reliable service, configured as either a fully

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/YXdPIWAuKDE/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YXdPIWAuKDE)

YouTube

[### Learn to run Microsoft Active Directory dependent apps and servers on Google Cloud](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YXdPIWAuKDE)

This tutorial details how to run Microsoft Active Directory dependent apps and servers on Google Cloud. You may need Active Directory in the cloud if you have VMs that are domain joined, you have something that needs Windows’ integrated

[![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/_DhBJ1Pi8_4/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_DhBJ1Pi8_4)

YouTube

[### Best Practices for Using Microsoft Active Directory (AD) and Apps on Google Cloud (Cloud Next '19)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_DhBJ1Pi8_4)

Microsoft Active Directory is still the standard for authentication, authorization, and auditing of users, groups, and applications in Windows environments. Join this session to see how you can leverage Google Cloud to manage your cloud-based

YouTube

[### Moving Identity to the Cloud](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CilTpRVQppI)

Aside from monitoring authorization on devices and location, it is crucial to initially establish who will have access. In this episode, Max covers how to quickly sync your employee active directory into Google Cloud by utilizing G Suite or the

YouTube
